block_02: Hum aapke dvaara haal hi me kiye gaye trade
block_04: ko nishpaadit karne me asamarth rahe hain, kyonki ise teesre-paksh Market Maker dvaara svikaar nahin kiya gaya hai, jise nishpaadan ke liye order bheja gaya tha. Yah kai kaarnon se ho sakta hai, in kaarnon me nishpaadan ke samay baajaar ki sthiti ya Market Maker ka apna jokhim prabandhan dhaancha shamil ho sakta hai.
block_05: Iske baad aur company ke niyamon aur sharton ke anurup, jise aapne company ke graahak banne par svikaar kiya aur apni sahmati di thi, aapke order ko sansaadhit nahin kiya ja saka aur nivesh ki gai raashi aapke khaate ki shesh rashi me vaapas kar di gai hai.
block_06: Yadi aap is sambandh me adhik jaankaari lena chahte hain, toh kripya niyam aur sharton ka anubhaag (9) dekhen.
